description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a cylindrical body, reinforced by four evenly spaced dark metal hoops that encircle its length. The barrel is mounted horizontally on a simple wooden stand, elevating it slightly above the ground. One end of the barrel features a prominent metal spigot, suggesting it is designed for dispensing liquids. The wood grain is visible, giving the surface a natural, slightly matte finish, while the metal bands and spigot have a subtle sheen. The construction appears robust, with metal rivets securing the hoops and a tight fit between the wooden staves. There are no visible labels or markings, and the overall design is functional and traditional, suitable for urban or rustic settings.
description: A wooden barrel with dark metal hoops, mounted on a wooden stand and equipped with a metal spigot for dispensing liquids. The surface is natural wood with visible grain and metallic accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, all four metal hoops, and the wooden stand.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the circular face of the barrel and the protruding metal spigot.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0 but with the spigot on the left side.
description_view_3: Rear end view showing the plain circular face of the barrel without the spigot.
